rationale: Slide 3 is visibly broken: a black 'Contact audit' chip and a blue bar bleed off the left edge at x=0, an empty mint-green placeholder box holds no content, and the 'Contact audit' label is duplicated as both a left-side chip and right-column footer. This is a clear alignment/whitespace/collision hard-fail well below commercial-tool polish, even though slides 1 and 2 are clean.
